publishedAbstract: - glustershd.log is getting fillup quickly because of accidental upgrade with following messages. ~~~ [2018-12-27 13:48:00.584416] I [rpc-clnt.c:2001:rpc_clnt_reconfig] 0-vol_XXX-client-2: changing port to 49153 (from 0) [2018-12-27 13:48:00.587569] I [MSGID: 114057] [client-handshake.c:1450:select_server_supported_programs] 0-vol_845675e1ba335c47b3bf73cb7d270d58-client-0: Using Program GlusterFS 3.3, Num (1298437), Version (330) [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588043] W [MSGID: 114043] [client-handshake.c:1104:client_setvolume_cbk] 0-vol_XXX-client-0: failed to set the volume [No such file or directory] [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588079] W [MSGID: 114007] [client-handshake.c:1133:client_setvolume_cbk] 0-vol_XXX-client-0: failed to get 'process-uuid' from reply dict [Invalid argument] [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588099] E [MSGID: 114044] [client-handshake.c:1139:client_setvolume_cbk] 0-vol_XXX-client-0: SETVOLUME on remote-host failed [No such file or directory] [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588119] I [MSGID: 114051] [client-handshake.c:1259:client_setvolume_cbk] 0-vol_XXX-client-0: sending CHILD_CONNECTING event [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588209] I [MSGID: 114018] [client.c:2280:client_rpc_notify] 0-vol_XXX-client-0: disconnected from vol_XXX-client-0. Client process will keep trying to connect to glusterd until brick's port is available [2018-12-27 13:48:00.588238] E [MSGID: 108006] [afr-common.c:4731:afr_notify] 0-vol_XXX-replicate-0: All subvolumes are down. Going offline until atleast one of them comes back up. ~~~
